message:
refactor(genome): write .md files instead of .yaml for agent specs

Switch all Genome write paths (addAgent, updateAgent, removeAgent,
initFromRoot, syncRoot, reconcileRootCapabilities) from .yaml/serializeAgentSpec
to .md/serializeAgentMarkdown. The YAML read path in loadFromDisk is preserved
for backward compatibility with existing genome directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
